title: Osprey Programming Language
name: Osprey
description: One core, two flavors: write Osprey in C-style braces or ML-style layout with curry-by-default. Both lower to one canonical AST with typed algebraic effects, fibers, persistent collections, Hindley-Milner inference, and LLVM code generation.
author: Christian Findlay
keywords: osprey, functional programming, language flavors, ML syntax, curry by default, algebraic effects, fibers, LLVM, type inference, pattern matching
